assertionResults.fullName: Simple Test should pass
assertionResults.title: should pass

assertionResults.fullName: Simple Test should handle strings
assertionResults.title: should handle strings

assertionResults.fullName: Colors should have primary color
assertionResults.title: should have primary color

assertionResults.fullName: Colors should have white and black defined
assertionResults.title: should have white and black defined

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Email Detection should detect valid email addresses
assertionResults.title: should detect valid email addresses

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Email Detection should handle emails with special characters
assertionResults.title: should handle emails with special characters

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Phone Number Detection should detect plain phone numbers
assertionResults.title: should detect plain phone numbers

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Phone Number Detection should detect phone numbers with country codes
assertionResults.title: should detect phone numbers with country codes

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Phone Number Detection should detect phone numbers with formatting
assertionResults.title: should detect phone numbers with formatting

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Phone Number Detection should handle phone numbers with spaces and dashes
assertionResults.title: should handle phone numbers with spaces and dashes

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Edge Cases should default to email for mixed alphanumeric
assertionResults.title: should default to email for mixed alphanumeric

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Edge Cases should handle empty strings
assertionResults.title: should handle empty strings

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Edge Cases should handle strings with only special characters
assertionResults.title: should handle strings with only special characters

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Real-world Examples should correctly identify Indian phone numbers
assertionResults.title: should correctly identify Indian phone numbers

assertionResults.fullName: detectIdentifierType Real-world Examples should correctly identify common email formats
assertionResults.title: should correctly identify common email formats

assertionResults.fullName: PujariCard renders priest name and rating correctly
assertionResults.title: renders priest name and rating correctly

assertionResults.fullName: PujariCard renders distance correctly
assertionResults.title: renders distance correctly

assertionResults.fullName: PujariCard renders ceremony count correctly
assertionResults.title: renders ceremony count correctly

assertionResults.fullName: PujariCard does not render ceremony count if undefined
assertionResults.title: does not render ceremony count if undefined

assertionResults.fullName: DocumentUpload Screen renders correctly
assertionResults.title: renders correctly

assertionResults.fullName: VerificationStatus Screen renders loading state initially
assertionResults.title: renders loading state initially

assertionResults.fullName: VerificationStatus Screen renders not_submitted state when no docs exist
assertionResults.title: renders not_submitted state when no docs exist

assertionResults.fullName: VerificationStatus Screen renders pending state when docs are pending
assertionResults.title: renders pending state when docs are pending

assertionResults.fullName: VerificationStatus Screen renders verified state when isVerified is true
assertionResults.title: renders verified state when isVerified is true
